summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of BulgarcaKolayca educational website. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend fully functional with excellent responsiveness and backend integration.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint responds correctly
Contact form submission API working with validation
Contact forms retrieval API working
Bulgarian quiz questions API returns 10 questions with proper structure
Turkish quiz questions API returns 10 questions
Level test quiz submission API processes and returns proper scoring/recommendations
API error handling works (404 for invalid language)
Hero section loads with YouTube video and CTA buttons
Navigation menu works with all links functional
Language switcher (TR/EN/BG) changes all text correctly
Course cards (A1/A2) display with pricing and enroll buttons
Pricing table displays correctly
Level Test quiz modal opens and functions properly
Quiz API integration - questions load from backend successfully
Quiz progression through all 10 questions works
Quiz language selection (Bulgarian/Turkish) works
Quiz submission to backend API successful
Contact form backend integration working
Contact form clears after successful submission
Mobile menu functionality working
Mobile and tablet responsiveness excellent
All major sections (About, Why Us, Footer) present
No JavaScript errors found
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (7/7 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (23/23 major features working)
